flashy.digitizers.dummy.channel module

class flashy.digitizers.dummy.channel.DummyDigitizerChannel(values=<factory>)

Bases: ParameterContainer

Dataclass for the configuration of a Dummy digitizer channel.

Inherits:

ParameterContainer

DEFINITIONS: ClassVar[Mapping[str, ParameterDefinition]]

Parameter definitions for Dummy digitizer channels.

flashy.digitizers.dummy.config module

class flashy.digitizers.dummy.config.DummyDigitizerConfig(channels, adc_nbits=-14, adc_samplrate_msps=-100.0)

Bases: Struct

channels: list[DummyDigitizerChannel]

List of channel configurations.

adc_nbits: int

ADC resolution in bits.

adc_samplrate_msps: float

ADC sampling rate in MSPS.

property display_name: str
property sampling_period_ns: float

Sampling period in nanoseconds.

Returns:

Sampling period computed from ADC sampling rate.

Return type:

float

get_adc_to_volts_factor(channel_id)

Compute ADC-to-volts conversion factor for a channel.

Parameters:

channel_id (int) – Index of the channel.

Returns:

Conversion factor based on coarse gain and ADC resolution.

Return type:

float
